title: Fresh Textures Legacy
description: Refresh your Minecraft gaming experience with new textures!
body:
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe04113f861c69764c0b730867cdc23bcbf96b7d.png)

**Fresh Textures (legacy)** — this is a project that completely repeats my Fresh Textures resourcepack, but for older versions of the game (1.13.2 and below) ## ⚙️ Compatibility It is recommended to use these mods for full compatibility of the resource pack: * [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) ## 💬 Community Join our [community on the discord server](https://discord.gg/nSJBpkeVv6) to chat, ask questions, or share your creations! ## ❗Used Resourcespacks that were used to create "FreshTextures": - [Armorstands Reimagined](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/armorstands-reimagined) - i used a 3D model of the armorstand - [Torches Reimagined](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/torches-reimagined) - used a 3d model of the torches and modified them a bit afterwards - [Chests Reimagined](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/chests-reimagined) - used the chest and the trap chest. - [Extended lantern](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/extended-illumina/versions) - [Stay True](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true) - [Hidyk's Realm](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hidyksrealm) ( most of the textures were taken from him! ) - [Detail Brush](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/detail-brush) - one of the brilliant best vanilla textures from the creator of Farmer's Delight (Brewin' and Chewin') 3D Tankards - [Refined Enchants](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/refined-enchants) - [Cubic Sun & Moon](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cubic-sun-moon) - [Enchantment Glows](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enchantment-glows) - was taken the idea of 3d arrows in crossbow and bow, which is more logical for minecraft. - [Modded Omelet](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/modded-omelet) - [Visuals](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/visuals) **(If you are the author of one of the resourcepacks or a resourcepack that is not on this list, message me in Discord)**
